name: steam-mcp
description: Read-only Steam: friends, games, playtime, achievements, sales, reviews, live player counts.
long_description:
A read-only Model Context Protocol server for the public Steam Web API and storefront. Ask about your friends and their live status, your owned games and playtime, achievement progress and rarity, plus account-independent things like what's on sale, review scores (lifetime and last-30-days), live concurrent player counts, and patch notes.

Bring your own key: each user supplies their own free Steam Web API key, requested securely on install. The server is strictly read-only — it never sends messages, changes status, launches games, or makes purchases. Note that friends lists, owned games, and achievements are only visible when the target Steam profile's privacy is set to Public.

tools.name: steam_resolve_vanity_url
tools.description: Resolve a vanity name or profile URL to a SteamID64

tools.name: steam_get_player_summary
tools.description: Profile and live status (Online/Away/In-Game) for 1-100 users

tools.name: steam_get_friend_list
tools.description: A user's friends, enriched with name and live status

tools.name: steam_get_owned_games
tools.description: Owned games with total and recent hours played

tools.name: steam_get_recently_played_games
tools.description: Games played in the last two weeks

tools.name: steam_get_player_bans
tools.description: VAC / game / community / economy ban status

tools.name: steam_get_game_schema
tools.description: A game's full achievement and stat definitions

tools.name: steam_search_apps
tools.description: Search the store by title to find a game's appid

tools.name: steam_get_app_details
tools.description: Store details: description, price, genres, release date

tools.name: steam_get_app_reviews
tools.description: Review score and samples, lifetime or last-N-days

tools.name: steam_get_store_highlights
tools.description: Top sellers, new releases, or coming soon

tools.name: steam_get_wishlist
tools.description: A user's wishlist, with live prices and what's on sale

tools.name: steam_get_current_players
tools.description: Live concurrent player count for a game

tools.name: steam_get_app_news
tools.description: Recent news and patch notes for a game

steam_api_key.title: Steam Web API Key
steam_api_key.description: Your personal Steam Web API key (32 hex characters). Get one free at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey
